CONTENT.Club career: On 11 September 2020, Barbieri joined Serie C side Juventus U23, the reserve team of Juventus, on a five-year contract. On 28 September, Barbieri made his debut for Juventus U23 in a 2–1 victory against Pro Sesto.On 16 April 2023, he made his Serie A debut for the first team in a match against Sassuolo.On 20 July 2023, Barbieri was loaned by Serie B club Pisa.On 6 August 2024, Cremonese announced his arrival, specifying that Barbieri had signed a contract valid until 30 June 2028 with the grey-red club.

SUMMARY: Tommaso Barbieri (born 26 August 2002) is an Italian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for serie B club Cremonese.
